calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-02-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-02-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Cindy Lee, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority.
Plaintiff's Witness: Philip Tam, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Charles Callum.
Exhibit 1 - Lease Agreement-----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Fourteen Day Notice-------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Proof of Service on Fourteen Day Notice------ID/EVID.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 330 Clementina St., #1203, San Francisco.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Back Rent and Damages $3,476.89
Costs $200.00
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibits in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: CINDY LEE AND ARNOLD EVJE FOR PLAINTIFF, SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, CHARLES CALLUM

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.
CLERK: NANCY REGAS/NOT REPORTED (218)
